# LojaSync — Grok Imagine Videos

Auto-generated high-quality marketing videos and motion animations for the LojaSync project.

**Generated by**: recurring scheduled loops (tasks 019e7f45baae & 019e7f8ed234, every 1m)  
**Location**: `grokimaginevideos/` inside the LojaSync repository

## 2026-05-31 15:25 — Batch #1 (2 videos)

### 1. lojasync-hero-20260531-152551-16x9.mp4
- **Duration**: 12 seconds
- **Format**: 720p, 16:9 (horizontal)
- **Style**: Cinematic premium SaaS marketing animation
- **Description**: 
  Opens in a busy Brazilian retail store at dusk. Store owner overwhelmed by paper romaneios and manual Excel work. Transitions into the elegant LojaSync web dashboard. Beautiful data flow animations showing PDF romaneios being parsed by AI, grades (P/M/G/cores) consolidated automatically. Split-screen comparison of painful manual entry vs. lightning-fast desktop automation into Byte Empresa ERP. Ends with satisfying logo reveal and tagline "Automação Inteligente para Lojistas".

- **Format**: 720p, 9:16 (vertical — optimized for Instagram Reels / YouTube Shorts / TikTok)
